title: DeWalt DWE575 7-1/4 in. Circular Saw (Used - Good)
description: Older DeWalt corded circular saw, runs strong. Some scuffs on the shoe and housing from job site use. Blade guard works fine, cord in good shape. Comes with the blade currently on it. Upgraded to a track saw so this one is going.
bulletPoints: Corded 15 amp motor, cuts clean|Shoe has scuffs but adjusts fine|Blade guard and cord in good shape|Includes the 24T blade on it now|Selling because I moved to a track saw

title: Black+Decker DR260C 5.2 Amp Corded Drill (Used - Good)
description: Corded 3/8 in. drill, works fine. Kept it as a backup but never reach for it anymore. Chuck holds bits tight, trigger and reverse both good. Light wear on the grip.
bulletPoints: Corded 5.2 amp, plenty for around the house|3/8 in. keyless chuck holds tight|Variable speed and reverse both work|Light wear on the grip|Backup drill I never use

title: Bosch 1617EVS 2.25 HP Fixed-Base Router (Used - Acceptable)
description: Fixed-base router a buddy at the shop gave me when he cleaned out his garage. Solid runner, speed dial works. Base has paint marks and the wrench is missing, use your own. Great starter router for the price.
bulletPoints: 2.25 HP variable speed, runs smooth|Fixed base, takes 1/4 and 1/2 in. collets|Speed dial works through the range|Base has paint marks, wrench not included|Coworker surplus, priced to move

title: Bessey 12 in. Bar Clamps, Set of 4 (Used - Good)
description: Four 12 inch bar clamps, all work great. Glue on a couple of the pads, wiped off most of it. I ended up buying longer clamps for panel glue-ups so these are extra. Sold as a set of 4.
bulletPoints: Set of four 12 in. bar clamps|All slide and lock like they should|Little dried glue on a couple pads|Bought longer clamps so these are extra|Good clamps for the money

title: DeWalt DWE6421 5 in. Random Orbit Sander (Used - Good)
description: Random orbit sander, works fine. Dust port intact, pad is in decent shape. Bit of paint on the body. Doubled up on sanders so this one is going.
bulletPoints: 5 in. hook and loop random orbit|Runs smooth, no wobble in the pad|Dust port and bag both there|Some paint on the body|Selling because I have two

title: Makita 4329K Corded Jigsaw with Case (Used - Good)
description: Corded jigsaw, comes with the plastic case and a few used blades. Cuts true, base tilts and locks. Case has a cracked corner but latches fine. Solid little saw.
bulletPoints: Corded jigsaw, cuts true|Base tilts and locks for bevels|Comes with case and a few blades|Case corner cracked, still latches|Good backup or first jigsaw

title: DeWalt DW680K 3-1/4 in. Corded Hand Planer (Used - Good)
description: Corded hand planer with the case. Blades are still sharp, depth knob works smooth. Little paint on the housing. Grabbed a wider planer so this one is extra.
bulletPoints: 3-1/4 in. corded hand planer|Blades sharp, takes a clean shaving|Depth adjust works smooth|Comes with the case|Some paint on the housing

title: Milwaukee 2656-20 M18 Impact Driver, Tool Only (Used - Good)
description: M18 impact driver, tool only, no battery or charger. Runs great, chuck holds bits tight. Normal job site wear on the housing. Went all in on a fuel kit so this bare tool is going.
bulletPoints: M18 1/4 in. hex impact driver|Tool only, no battery or charger|Runs strong, plenty of torque|Normal wear on the housing|Selling because I upgraded kits

title: Stabila 48 in. Box Beam Level (Used - Good)
description: 48 inch Stabila level, still reads dead on. Frame has some scuffs and a couple stickers I peeled. Ordered a 78 in. so this one is spare.
bulletPoints: 48 in. box beam level|Vials read dead on, checked it|Frame scuffed but straight|Solid pro level|Spare after buying a longer one

title: Narex 4-Piece Bench Chisel Set (Used - Good)
description: Set of four Narex bench chisels, sharpened and ready. Handles are solid, one has a small ding. Duplicated my set so these are extra. Comes as the four.
bulletPoints: Four bench chisels 6 12 20 26mm|Sharpened and honed, ready to use|Handles solid, one small ding|Duplicate set, priced fair|Great starter joinery chisels

title: DeWalt DWE402 4-1/2 in. Angle Grinder (Used - Acceptable)
description: Corded angle grinder, runs strong. Guard is a little bent but still works, comes with the side handle. Sparks and grinds fine. Sold as is, plenty of life left.
bulletPoints: 4-1/2 in. corded angle grinder|11 amp, runs strong|Guard slightly bent, still works|Includes side handle|Plenty of life left, sold as is

title: Bostitch 16-Gauge Finish Nailer (Used - Good)
description: 16 gauge finish nailer, drives clean. No jams last I used it. Body has trim paint on it. Switched to a cordless nailer so this pneumatic is going.
bulletPoints: 16 gauge angled finish nailer|Drives clean, no jams|Trim paint on the body|Pneumatic, needs a compressor|Switched to cordless so this is extra

title: DeWalt DWE315K Corded Oscillating Multi-Tool Kit (Used - Good)
description: Oscillating multi-tool with the case and a handful of used blades. Works great for flush cuts and grout removal. Some paint on the housing. Extra tool cleaning out the shop.
bulletPoints: Corded oscillating multi-tool|Comes with case and used blades|Great for flush cuts and cutouts|Some paint on the housing|Cleaning out the shop

title: Swanson 7 in. Speed Square with Book (Used - Good)
description: Aluminum speed square, still square. Some layout pencil marks and scuffs. Comes with the little layout book. Had a pile of these so passing one on cheap.
bulletPoints: 7 in. aluminum speed square|Checked, still dead square|Layout marks and scuffs|Includes the layout book|Had extras, priced cheap

title: Milwaukee 25 ft. Magnetic Tape Measure (Used - Good)

bulletPoints: 25 ft. magnetic tip tape measure|Blade straight, hook tight|Case scuffed but solid|Magnet grabs steel studs|Had three, one is extra

title: Makita JR3050T Corded Reciprocating Saw (Used - Good)
description: Corded recip saw, cuts hard. Shoe adjusts, blade clamp holds tight. Comes with a couple of used demo blades. Little paint on it. Got a cordless one so this is spare.
bulletPoints: Corded reciprocating saw|Cuts hard through wood and nails|Adjustable shoe, tight blade clamp|Includes a couple demo blades|Spare after buying cordless

title: Stanley Low-Angle Block Plane (Used - Good)
description: Low-angle block plane, tuned and sharp. Sole is flat, mouth adjusts. Some patina on the body, nothing that hurts it. Extra after I picked up a nicer one.
bulletPoints: Low-angle block plane|Tuned, sole flat, iron sharp|Adjustable mouth works|Honest patina on the body|Extra after buying a nicer plane

title: Milwaukee Gel Knee Pads (Used - Good)

bulletPoints: Gel-filled work knee pads|Padding still solid|Straps all intact|Wiped down, some honest wear|Extra after buying a new pair

title: DeWalt 21-Piece Titanium Drill Bit Set (Used - Good)

title: Milwaukee M18 LED Work Light, Tool Only (Used - Good)
